hero.title: Turan Hidayatov
hero.subtitle: Full-Stack Web Developer
hero.description: A full-stack developer specialized in PHP, Laravel, and MySQL with expertise in RESTful APIs, MVC architecture, and backend development.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I'm Turan Hidayatov, a full-stack web developer with expertise in PHP and Laravel backend development, RESTful APIs, MySQL/PostgreSQL, and MVC architecture. I have worked on diverse projects including courier, logistics, warehouse management, and government portal platforms.

why-need-website.title: Why Your Business Needs a Professional Website
why-need-website.description: In the digital age, a professional website is essential for your business success
why-need-website.body_title: Why Your Business Needs a Professional Website
why-need-website.paragraph1: Did you know that 75% of users judge a company's credibility based on its website? In today's digital world, potential clients first search for you online. A professional website is no longer a luxury — it's a necessity for any serious business.
why-need-website.why_title: What You Lose Without a Website?
why-need-website.why_desc: Key benefits of having a professional website:
features: 24/7 availability — customers can find you anytime, even outside business hours
Trust and credibility — a professional site shows you're serious about your business
Competitive advantage — stay ahead of competitors who lack an online presence
Marketing hub — a central place for all your marketing campaigns
Customer insights — analyze visitor behavior and improve your strategy
why-need-website.start_desc: A well-crafted website gives your business these opportunities:
why-need-website.code:
Professional website = 24/7 sales machine
• Customers can find you day and night
• Showcase your portfolio and achievements
• Share customer reviews and success stories
• Contact information always accessible
• Get found on Google and other search engines
why-need-website.conclusion_desc: Without an online presence, your business is invisible. If you don't have a professional website, potential customers won't find you — they'll go to your competitors. Take action now and establish your business in the digital world!

choose-right-developer.title: 5 Things to Consider Before Hiring a Web Developer
choose-right-developer.description: Essential tips for choosing the right web developer for your project
choose-right-developer.body_title: 5 Things to Consider Before Hiring a Web Developer
choose-right-developer.paragraph1: Hiring a web developer is a crucial decision for your business. Choosing the right person can make or break your project. In this post, we'll cover 5 essential things you need to consider before hiring a web developer.
choose-right-developer.why_desc: Benefits of choosing the right developer:
features: Quality results — a professional developer meets your expectations
Time savings — experienced developers deliver faster
Support and maintenance — ensure your site's longevity
SEO readiness — your site ranks higher on search engines
Mobile optimization — perfect display on all devices
choose-right-developer.start_desc: Consider these points when choosing a developer:
choose-right-developer.code:
1. Portfolio — review their previous work carefully
2. Technology stack — ask about the technologies they use
3. References — contact their past clients
4. Pricing — choose value, not the cheapest option
5. Support — do they offer post-launch support?
choose-right-developer.conclusion_desc: Choosing the right developer is the most important factor for your project's success. Consider their portfolio, technical expertise, references, and support services before making a decision. Remember: the cheapest option often costs more in the long run.

successful-website-features.title: 5 Essential Features of a Successful Website
successful-website-features.description: Discover the secrets of websites that attract customers and boost sales
successful-website-features.body_title: 5 Essential Features of a Successful Website
successful-website-features.paragraph1: A successful website isn't just about looking good — it needs to convert visitors into customers. In this post, we'll explain 5 essential features every professional website must have to deliver maximum results.
successful-website-features.why_desc: The 5 essential features of a successful website:
features: Fast loading — 53% of users leave if a site takes over 3 seconds to load
Mobile responsiveness — 60% of web traffic comes from mobile devices
User-friendly design — intuitive navigation and clear structure
SEO optimization — rank higher on Google search results
Strong Call-to-Action — buttons that drive visitors to take action
successful-website-features.start_desc: Apply these features to your website:
successful-website-features.code:
✓ Speed: optimize images, remove unnecessary plugins
✓ Mobile: use responsive design
✓ Design: keep it clean and simple
✓ SEO: choose right keywords, write meta descriptions
✓ CTA: at least one call-to-action on every page
successful-website-features.conclusion_desc: A successful website is more than just good design — it must be functional and user-friendly. With speed, mobile optimization, SEO, and strong CTAs, you can make your website truly engaging. A professional website multiplies your return on investment!
